recipes.name: Pancakes
steps:
Sift flour and sugar together in a large bowl. 
      Make a well in the center and add milk, melted butter, and egg; mix until smooth.

Heat a lightly oiled griddle or pan over medium-high heat. Pour or scoop the batter onto the griddle, using approximately 1/4 cup for each pancake; cook until bubbles form and the edges are dry, about 2 to 3 minutes.
Flip and cook until golden brown on both sides

recipes.name: Spaghetti Bolognese
steps: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
BIn a separate pan, brown beef with onion, then add tomato sauce and simmer.

recipes.name: Avocado Toast
steps: Mash avocado and spread on toast, then season.

recipes.name: Cheese Omelette
steps: Cook in butter, add cheese, fold, and serve.

recipes.name: Ramen
steps: Cook noodles and boil eggs separately.
Combine noodles with seasoning and top with eggs.

recipes.name: Cheese Pizza
steps: Prepare dough and spread tomato sauce.
Add cheese and bake until crust is golden.

recipes.name: Sushi
steps: Add fillings, roll tightly, and slice.

recipes.name: Chocolate Cake
steps: Mix all ingredients into a batter.
Pour into a pan and bake until cooked through.
